applies_to: Outputs, artifacts, missions, evidence records and Hermes handoff previews created in this local Mission Control sandbox

unclassified.label: Unclassified · Preview Only
unclassified.summary: Classify the context before any handoff. Exploration remains local and no external action is available.

green.label: EDENA Green · bounded
green.summary: Low-consequence, reversible sandbox work using public, synthetic or approved non-sensitive information.

yellow.label: EDENA Yellow · verify
yellow.summary: Facts, scope, evidence, intended use or destination require deliberate verification before handoff.

orange.label: EDENA Orange · qualified review
orange.summary: High-consequence, complex, sensitive or automation-related work requires structured qualified-human review.

red.label: EDENA Red · high-risk advisory
red.summary: Potential for serious harm, unauthorized scope/data/action or consequential use without required authority. Sanitized exploration only.

personal.label: Personal Edition
personal.red_behavior: Show a prominent warning, require deliberate acknowledgment, permit sanitized local exploration and a reviewed-plan record, block Authorized Execution and later states.

institutional_preview.label: Institutional policy preview
institutional_preview.orange_and_red_behavior: Block Approved Plan and all later states; allow only a manual blocked-state review or escalation request after acknowledgment.
institutional_preview.notice: This static package cannot provide tamper-resistant access control, organizational identity, policy validation, audit integration, or managed authorization. A real institutional deployment must enforce those controls outside this app.

transition_rules.rule: After the first saved revision, a non-sample mission may advance by at most one artifact state per save; moving backward is permitted.
Approved Plan or a later state requires a completed Plan stage, a user-attested human review, and a non-sensitive approval reference. Mission Control does not verify that review.
Authorized Execution or a later state requires a completed Implement stage and authority outside this app. The label records a user assertion; it does not execute or prove authorization.
Evaluated Outcome requires a completed Evaluate stage.
A mission may be marked completed only after Evaluate is complete.
When an earlier stage changes, later completed stages that were not changed in the same revision are reopened and marked for review.

permanent_accountability: AI supports but does not replace professional judgment.
Hermes and Nurse AI OS do not hold a clinical license or assume professional accountability.
Every draft must be reviewed before clinical, legal, financial, employment, academic, or institutional use.
Do not enter protected health information, confidential institutional information, confidential personnel information, or secrets.
The user remains responsible for facts, evidence, recommendations, permissions, and final actions.
Real-world execution requires permissions and controls outside this sandbox.
